title: Building AI Agent Systems and Scaling Challenges in Agentic AI
summary: Sam Anthony discusses scaling challenges in agentic AI systems, highlighting how cost, latency, and failure risk increase with scale. The talk covers multi-agent design, coordination, and system architecture as key factors in real-world scalability.
writeup: Sam Anthony examines how AI agent systems behave as they grow, arguing that scaling raises cost, latency, and the risk of failure. The video frames multi-agent design, coordination, and system architecture as the factors that determine whether agentic AI holds up in real-world use. The takeaway: scalability is shaped less by individual agents than by how they are coordinated and structured at the system level.
